task_completion.description: Log into SEB Server and access the dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server web interface is visible in the browser, indicating successful login.
The configuration editor is open with the title or header clearly showing 'Certification Exam Fall 2024'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the User Interface settings section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'User Interface' tab or section is selected and its settings are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the Browser View Mode to 'Window'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Browser View Mode' dropdown or selection field is set to 'Window'.

task_completion.description: Enable the Task Bar and set its height to 44
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Show Task Bar' (or similar) checkbox/toggle is enabled, and the 'Task Bar Height' input field contains the value '44'.

task_completion.description: Configure Reload Button, Time, and Keyboard Layout display settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Show Reload Button' checkbox is disabled/unchecked, the 'Show Time' checkbox is enabled/checked, and the 'Show Keyboard Layout' (or Input Language) checkbox is disabled/unchecked.
A 'Save' button is clicked, or a success notification/toast message indicating that the configuration has been saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server UI
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window (like Chrome or Firefox) is open and navigating the http://localhost:8080 URL, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server web application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with the web UI elements (dropdowns, checkboxes, text fields) rather than editing a local file or mocking the interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing database commands (e.g., sqlite3, psql, or mongo) to bypass the web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target configuration name: 'Certification Exam Fall 2024'. Expected UI settings: Browser View Mode = Window (1), Show Task Bar = enabled (true), Task Bar Height = 44, Show Reload Button = disabled (false), Show Time = enabled (true), Show Input Language / Keyboard Layout = disabled (false).
